steps.title: Read the soul image
steps.content: The narrator says the soul seemed to leave the body and lose itself in the beauty of the night. Only a trembling suggestion of its existence remained, so the word points to a faint sign or remnant.

steps.title: Reject unrelated meanings
steps.content: Choice B means a viewpoint, but the sentence describes what remains of the soul. Choice C means disagreement, and Choice D means an order; neither fits the scene. A word meaning a faint remnant matches the image. The answer is A.
